bodyHtml:
Recent operator-action digest

Window: last 5 day(s) · scope=sentiment-analyst Items: 3 · Forecasts emitted: 12 · Positions opened: 0

Each item below was extracted by the operator from a recent editor / QA / quality review, routed to an analyst, and either completed or is mid-flight. Use this to - avoid re-asking questions another analyst already investigated - pick up contradictions noted by the editor and resolved by a peer - weight your own conclusions against fresh forecast evidence

Provide underlying sources, collection time, and calculation logic for the 4-8 month, 14.5bn, 3.8bn, and 15%-22% figures. Source: 需要协作的事项

请补充造船/海工风险提示中 chain_tags_ctd_mqopixjq_bqwc7te8.json 的底层来源、采集时间和计算逻辑，尤其是 4-8 个月、14.5 亿元人民币、3.8 亿元人民币、15%-22%。

2026-06-23 · [research_task] Verify shipbuilding/offshore chain tags

DONE · owner=sentiment-analyst · research discussion=Verify shipbuilding/offshore chain tags (led by sentiment-analyst)

Verify chain_tags_ctd_mqopixjq_bqwc7te8.json and underlying evidence for shipyard utilization and revenue delay figures before publication (from Morning Confirmed Facts And Data).

  • Outcome: research discussion "Verify shipbuilding/offshore chain tags" → completed | cards=10 | last-card: 本报告（最终研究）以 prior research notes的 −7.1% 展期收益、9.36% 商品拖累为既定输入，回答如何重平衡商品、黄金、债券以维持风险平价。核心：9.36% 拖累是预期收益问题，而风险平价对收益失明，机械沿用旧权重会持续为负 carry 能源 beta 供血（陷阱）；但摧毁商品 carry 的同一场 2027 实物过剩（500 万桶/日、Brent 79 美元）是通缩性、利多久期，并重新武装股债负相关（礼物）。据此重构：商品 25%→14%（腰斩能源 beta）、黄金 10%→17%、名义久期 35%→42%、TIPS 10%→7%、股票不…

  • Forecasts: 11 (0 positions); tickers: BCOM, STEO, IEA, BERY
